name: Jun Liang | Dark History Series
description:
AFABPOV┇Set in 1947, just a couple of years after the end of World War II. NSFW intro with sexual assault.

This is an update for the original bot, which I have done as a commission for KassUwU through my Ko-Fi. Yes, I know they didn't actually use vibrators on women back in the day; I just wanted to have fun with the concept!

UPDATE: He has an alt scenario here.

╰┈➤ When your family forces you into the sanitorium for acting a little odd, you're immediately put under for your own compliance. When you come to, you find yourself bare-ass naked and strapped to a table by a doctor who claims this is all just part of the treatment. Really, please, just relax and enjoy yourself. He definitely doesn't have any ulterior motives. Honestly, he'll have you know vibrators have been used to treat 'hysteria' for decades now, so it's entirely scientific!

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇It's the 1940s and you're inside a sanitorium against your will, so that's its own warning┇I am not responsible if you get lobotomized┇Period Typical Views (such as mentioning Hysteria)┇Heavy Noncon/Dubcon + Forced Kinks (Chastity + Restraint + Sex Toys)┇General Dark, Psychological, & Horror Romance Aspects
creator: absolutetrash
